Bus Timings

8 Boulevard Walk Tower 1 Bus Stop: Route and Information in Dubai

October 31, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Located in the heart of Downtown Dubai, the 8 Boulevard Walk Tower 1 Bus Stop is a pivotal point in Dubai’s public transportation network. This stop is strategically positioned to provide convenient access to various local amenities, landmarks, and attractions. Its central location makes it a vital hub for both residents and visitors navigating the bustling area.

Address

8 Boulevard Walk Tower 1, Downtown Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates

Map

View Google Directions here.

Situated in the bustling Downtown Dubai area, the 8 Boulevard Walk Tower 1 Bus Stop plays a crucial role in the city’s public transportation system. The stop is seamlessly connected to multiple bus routes, facilitating easy travel across various parts of Dubai. Its strategic location near key landmarks, shopping centers, and dining options makes it an essential hub for both residents and visitors navigating the vibrant Downtown district.

Bus Routes and Timings

The following bus routes service the 8 Boulevard Walk Tower 1 Bus Stop, providing frequent departures throughout the day:

Bus Route Destination Timings
26 Oud Metha Bus Stn - Business Bay 2 Bus Stn 06:07, 06:22, 06:42, 07:09, 07:24, 07:39, 07:59, 08:14, 08:29, 08:44, 08:59, 09:24, 09:39, 09:49, 10:04, 10:19, 10:39, 15:09, 15:59, 16:24, 16:44, 16:59, 17:17, 17:32, 17:47, 18:07, 18:22, 18:37, 18:52, 19:07, 19:22, 19:37, 19:52, 20:06, 20:30, 20:50
F13 Dubai Mall MS - The Dubai Mall 06:18, 06:53, 07:13, 07:26, 07:40, 07:51, 08:03, 08:15, 08:31, 08:43, 08:55, 09:08, 09:19, 09:31, 09:43, 09:55, 10:07, 10:20, 10:33, 10:46, 10:59, 11:13, 11:26, 11:41, 11:54, 12:08, 12:20, 12:33, 12:44, 12:57, 13:11, 13:23, 13:34, 13:46, 13:58, 14:11, 14:23, 14:35, 14:46, 15:00, 15:18, 15:30, 15:44, 15:58, 16:10, 16:23, 16:38, 16:53, 17:03, 17:13, 17:23, 17:32, 17:39, 17:53, 18:08, 18:19, 18:29, 18:40, 18:51, 19:02, 19:12, 19:22, 19:34, 19:44, 19:57, 20:06, 20:17, 20:32, 20:47, 20:59, 21:12, 21:26, 21:39, 21:51, 22:04, 22:19, 22:31, 22:44, 22:59, 23:19, 23:35, 00:10+1

Bus Route Details

The 8 Boulevard Walk Tower 1 Bus Stop is serviced by two key bus routes, 26 and F13, ensuring reliable transportation throughout the day.

  • 26 Route: Connects Oud Metha Bus Station to Business Bay 2 Bus Station, with buses running frequently from early morning to late evening. The route covers essential areas, offering multiple departures throughout the day for convenient access.

  • F13 Route: Operates between Dubai Mall MS and The Dubai Mall, providing continuous service from early morning until late at night.

For precise timings and to ensure a smooth travel experience, it is recommended to check the latest bus schedules.

Nearby Destinations

Cafeterias

The area around the bus stop offers a variety of dining options:

  • Taxas De Brazil-Dubai Cafeteria: Enjoy authentic Brazilian cuisine.

  • Tribes Dubai Mall Cafeteria: A unique dining experience with a variety of international dishes.
  • Republic & Co Cafeteria: Offers a range of casual dining options.
  • Tulum Cafeteria: Known for its vibrant atmosphere and diverse menu.
  • Tasting Bay Cafeteria LLC: Perfect for sampling a range of culinary delights.

Landmarks

Explore the notable landmarks within walking distance:

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  • Clover Bay Tower: A prominent skyscraper in the area.

  • The Binary by Omniyat: A striking twin-tower development.
  • The Executive Tower: A key building in the Downtown area.
  • Vide Residence: A modern residential development.
  • BLVD Crescent - Emaar: A luxury residential project offering premium amenities.

Shopping Centres

Shopping enthusiasts will find several options close to the bus stop:

  • Parking Lot Shopping Mall: Convenient shopping facilities.

  • Salaam5 Online Shopping Mall: Offers a wide range of online shopping options.
  • Dubai Gift Shopping Mall: Ideal for finding unique gifts and souvenirs.
  • Noon Shopping Mall: A large mall with various retail outlets.
  • Blue Stand Department Shopping Mall: Features diverse shopping choices.

Healthcare Facilities

Ensure your health needs are met with nearby healthcare services:

  • Nurseco Home Healthcare LLC: Provides home-based medical care.

  • Medilife Healthcare Services LLC: Offers a range of medical services.
  • Manzil Healthcare Services: Comprehensive healthcare solutions.
  • Amana Healthcare: Specialized medical services and support.

Pharmacies

For pharmaceutical needs, several pharmacies are within reach:

  • Supercare Pharmacy: A well-stocked pharmacy for general health needs.

  • Boots Pharmacy: Known for its extensive selection of medicines.
  • Life Pharmacy Bay Square: Offers a range of health-related products.
  • Marina Pharmacy: Convenient location for pharmaceutical supplies.
  • New Planet Pharmacy: Provides essential health services and products.

Nearby Stops

  1. 8 Boulevard Walk Tower 2(93m): 26

  2. Clover Bay Tower 2(211m): 51, F19B, F41

  3. Clover Bay Tower 1(269m): F14, F19A

  4. East Height Towers Entrance G(339m): 26, 51, F19A, F19B

  5. Lake Central Tower 1(366m): 26, F14, F19A

The 8 Boulevard Walk Tower 1 Bus Stop is more than just a transit point; it’s a gateway to the vibrant life of Downtown Dubai. With its comprehensive connectivity, proximity to essential services, and access to a variety of amenities, it serves as a crucial link in the city’s transportation network, enhancing convenience for all who pass through.

Official UAE Sources

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
